**Summary:** All enabled accounts use strong SHA-512 hashing.

| Account | Hash Algorithm | Status |
|---------|----------------|--------|

| daemon | DISABLED/NO_PASSWORD | System account |
| bin | DISABLED/NO_PASSWORD | System account |
| postgres | SHA-512 | ✓ Strong (uses salted SHA-512 with 656000 rounds) |
